creator: julien@perdition.city
text:
Hi Stefan,

I had contact with the port maintener in the past which confirmed the
problem, I think he has an update, but was flooded with work at that
time.

Best regards,
Julien

On Fri, 2009-01-09 at 11:11 +0100, Stefan Walter wrote:
> Hi Julien, hi Fernan,
> 
> there hasn't been an update on this issue [1] for quite a while. I'm
> trying to find out what the state of this is. Is there an update for the
> port that can be committed?
> 
> Regards,
> Stefan
> 
> [1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/128271
